studyName: Population Architecture using Genomics and Epidemiology (PAGE): Causal Variants Across the Life Course (CALiCo): Hispanic Community Health Study / Study of Latinos (HCHS/SOL)

tables.description: Sample ID, body site where sample was obtained, analyte type, tumor status, and histological type of sample obtained from participants involved in the "Population Architecture using Genomics and Epidemiology (PAGE): Causal Variants Across the Life Course (CALiCo): Hispanic Community Health Study / Study of Latinos (HCHS/SOL)" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample
